title: Brrr
description: **Brrr** is a curated private modpack designed for the **Computers Go Brrr** community. It strikes a balance between technical innovation, culinary exploration, and essential quality-of-life improvements, all while staying true to the vanilla spirit.
body:
![Brrr Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b381de4754b33a48b32813c1ee87019691001dd_0.webp)

# 🧊 Brrr — Automation. Aesthetics. Absolute Speed.

Welcome to **Brrr**, the curated modpack where your contraptions are loud, your base is beautiful, and your FPS... well, it just goes **brrr**. 

Designed for the **Computers Go Brrr** community, this pack is a love letter to technical precision and cozy, high-fidelity world-building. We've stripped away the bloat and kept only the absolute best, ensuring a silky-smooth experience that feels like vanilla+, but with a lot more gears.

---

## ⚙️ The Age of Engineering (Create)
At the heart of **Brrr** is the full **Create** suite. We don't just build bases; we build *industrial masterpieces*.
- **🚂 Steam 'n' Rails:** Take your rail network to the next level with expanded tracks and logistical upgrades.
- **🧪 Enchantment Industry:** Automate your experience! Liquidate your levels and mass-produce enchanted gear with clockwork efficiency.
- **🥯 Slice & Dice:** The ultimate kitchen automation. Let the mechanical arms do the prep work for your high-tier meals.
- **⚡ Crafts & Additions:** Bridge the gap between kinetic energy and electricity.

## 🏮 Eastern Elegance & Zen Design
Why build a stone box when you could live in a masterpiece? We've included a hand-picked selection of decorative mods to make your world feel alive.
- **⛩️ Architectural Wonders:** Construct massive **Torii gates**, elegant **Pagoda houses**, and serene **Asian Fountains**.
- **🌸 Lush Flora:** Decorate with **Giant Cherry Blossom Bonsai** and a variety of oversized, majestic trees.
- **🎨 Immersive Detail:** From **Small Cat Statues** to **Sunken Warrior** monuments, every corner of your base can tell a story.
- **🪑 Paladin's Furniture:** Functional and beautiful furniture to turn your house into a home.

## 🍱 Culinary Masterpieces
Don't settle for boring bread. **Farmer's Delight** and its **Asian Food** expansions turn hunger into a hobby.
- **🍜 Street Food & More:** Set up your own **Asian Food Carts** and serve up world-class ramen and sushi.
- **🍳 Professional Kitchens:** Use technical automation to feed the whole server with the finest statistical-boosting meals.

## 🚀 Performance Goes Brrr
We take our name seriously. This pack is optimized to the moon and back.
- **⚡ The "Silky Smooth" Suite:** Powered by **Sodium**, **Lithium**, and **Indium** for maximum frames.
- **🌐 Network & World Gen:** Using **C2ME**, **VMP**, and **Krypton** to ensure the server stays fast even when the factories are roaring.
- **📱 Cleanest UI:** A perfectly tuned **EMI** and **Jade** setup gives you all the info you need without the clutter.

# WARNING
Expanded Storage mod has been removed by the author due to disputes.  This mod will be replaced in the future by Sophisticated Storage, which is added in the pack now, in 1.7.1.  Sophisticated Storage also duplicates Storage Drawers, so Storage Drawers will likely be removed in the future as well.  Please recreate all storage using Sophisticated Storage.
